items.title: New customs charges scam warning as fraudsters target Irish online shoppers
items.summary: The Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (CCPC) has warned of a surge in scam texts targeting online shoppers in Ireland as new customs charges are set to take effect on 1 July

items.title: Let There Be Rock: Late AC/DC Frontman Bon Scott Remembered With Melbourne Mural
